message:
feat(termwiz): add tile-aligned dirty region rendering to widget compositor

Extends the widget rendering pipeline to support tile-aligned dirty
regions in addition to the existing rect-based approach, enabling more
efficient GPU upload strategies for tiled renderers.

Changes to widgets/mod.rs:
- Import reordering (crate::Result moved to top)
- DirtyRegionMode enum: Rects (existing behavior) vs Tiles { w, h }
- render_subtree() now accepts a DirtyRegionMode parameter
- Dispatches to draw_from_screen_with_dirty_rects or the new
  draw_from_screen_with_dirty_tiles based on mode
- 4 new RenderTelemetry fields: widget_dirty_tiles,
  widget_dirty_tile_cells, widget_upload_regions, widget_upload_cells
- Accumulates telemetry per-mode for accurate tile vs rect accounting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
